story.description: A clip of nocturnal animals: an owl is sitting in the tree trunk
story.hook: Owls can make a hunt almost silent.
story.lead: Owls can make a hunt almost silent. Watch the wing edge, because owl feathers have soft fringes that break up noisy airflow. That quiet flight helps them hear prey and arrive without warning. The silence is built into the feather. Would you hear the landing?
story.script: Owls can make a hunt almost silent. Watch the wing edge, because owl feathers have soft fringes that break up noisy airflow. That quiet flight helps them hear prey and arrive without warning. The silence is built into the feather. Would you hear the landing?
